title: Submission: GANGUS × NEXUS — Multi-Model AI Orchestrator (gangus-nexus)
author: wojciechkowalczyk11to-tech

data.description: Shares weights across layers to reduce parameter count.
Grouped-query attention with reduced KV heads to lower parameter and memory cost.
Uses rotary positional embeddings, described as having zero positional parameters.
Combines transformer blocks with linear attention in an RWKV-style hybrid design.
AI-orchestrated architecture search using multi-tier model delegation across multiple LLM systems and MCP tools.

novel_contributions: AI-orchestrated architecture search using multi-tier model delegation
Cross-layer weight sharing to reduce parameters
Grouped-query attention with reduced KV heads
Hybrid transformer plus linear attention design
Post-training int8 quantization and magnitude pruning
Multi-model infrastructure stack spanning orchestration, backend, research, and infra control plane
